title: ComputerCraft Create
description: ComputerCraft textures that fit in with Create.
body:
# ccc ComputerCraft textures that fit in with Create. Want brass computers with amber phosphor screens? Chunky 8-inch floppy disks? Turtles with silly faces? Then this pack is for you! This project is affiliated with neither Create nor ComputerCraft. P.S., if you're wondering what happened to the custom computer models: [https://github.com/cc-tweaked/CC-Tweaked/issues/1644](https://github.com/cc-tweaked/CC-Tweaked/issues/1644)
